text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Rice Shower reveals to me that
she's afraid she'll disappoint her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the past, all she would have done was quiver in
fear, but now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering the joy on her fans' faces and in
their cheers instills within her enough confidence
for her to take on the race.
